name: Mr. Metaphysical — The Circle
entity: Mr. Metaphysical Health and Wellness, Inc.

voice.tone: warm, real, modern, non-clinical, growth-forward — NOT mystical, NOT cold therapy-speak
voice.personality: the friend who went deep on personal development and came back with tools that actually work. Confident but accessible. Speaks to the whole person.
do: Reference coaches as independent practitioners — never 'therapists'
Speak to men and women equally — but lean into a male growth-focused audience when appropriate
Reference The Circle as a community, not a service
dont: Never use clinical language — this is NOT therapy
Never use mystical or esoteric language (that's the Institute, not The Circle)
Never position as a mental health treatment
sample_phrases: The version of yourself you've been putting off — this is where you build him.
Growth isn't linear. But it is possible. Consistently.
Find a coach who gets where you're trying to go.
The Circle. Where real growth happens with real people.

aida.attention_hook: name a growth plateau or life transition that resonates
aida.interest: introduce the concept of personalized coaching in a human, accessible way
aida.desire: the person you become when you stop trying to figure it out alone
aida.action: find your coach at circle.mrmetaphysical.io / book a free consult / browse the directory
